rule_name: Credential harvesting phishing campaign targeting employees
description: 47 employees received phishing email with subject 'Action required: Re-authenticate Microsoft 365 within 24 hours'. Sender domain spoofed as microsoft-secure-login[.]com. Embedded URL points to credential harvester. Email security platform quarantined messages on delivery based on URL reputation hit. Three recipients manually reported as phishing. No click-through events recorded.
raw_log_excerpt: [Defender for O365] Action=Quarantined Subject='Action required: Re-authenticate Microsoft 365 within 24 hours' From=security-noreply@microsoft-secure-login.com URL=https://microsoft-secure-login.com/oauth/verify?id=...
